name: rlm
description: Agentic workflow framework built on Recursive Language Models (RLM). Foundation skills for large-context processing, recursive context gathering, conversation distillation, and descriptive artifact generation. Composite skills for comprehensive documentation, design document generation, and codebase research. Planning skills for feature, sprint, and epic-level implementation planning. Analysis skills for design validation, code/doc quality review, and root cause diagnosis. Action skills for TDD implementation from feature plans and derived document regeneration. Delegates to orchestrator agents that chunk, delegate to sub-agents, and aggregate results without polluting the parent context window.
